audit_items.proof_trace: All five dynamic allocations in nfp_nsp.c are freed on every exit path: (1) kzalloc(state) in nfp_nsp_open is freed via nfp_nsp_close on every error path and by the caller on success; (2-4) kzalloc(chunks), kmalloc(chunk_size)×nseg, and kmalloc(desc_sz) in nfp_nsp_command_buf_dma_sg are freed via a correct labeled-goto cascade (exit_unmap_desc→exit_free_desc→exit_unmap_all→exit_unmap_prev→exit_free_prev) that handles DMA map failures, allocation failures, and the success path identically; (5) kzalloc(buf) in nfp_nsp_read_module_eeprom is freed unconditionally before every return at L1100.
